wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Pumpkin Candle|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Energy|2}}
{{R|Pumpkin Candle||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}.


== Sources ==
Can be offered at the start of [[StS2:Acts#Act 2|Act 2]] by {{KW|Tezcatara||2}}.

===Spawn Restrictions===
*Because '''Pumpkin Candle''' shares a relic pool with {{R|Golden Compass||2}} and {{R|Toy Box||2}}, only 1 of the 3 can be offered by {{KW|Tezcatara||2}}.
